revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-3-090

Alternative terms: Wind-driven generator, Wind-turbine generator, Aerogenerator

A rotary electric generator for which the motive power is the wind. The axis of rotation may be horizontal or vertical.


Note: The term "wind generator" is deprecated.

{{IALAFooter}}
